title: India Search Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating Google's core search for India's diverse digital landscape.
problem_statement: Existing search paradigms may not fully address India's unique linguistic diversity and digital literacy needs.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for search in diverse Indian contexts.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry, uncovering latent needs and behaviors.

pillars.title: Accessibility
pillars.insight: Many new users struggle with complex interfaces.

pillars.title: Relevance
pillars.insight: Users seek highly localized and contextual information.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Quick access to information is paramount for all users.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we make search more intuitive for new Indian users?
How might users discover local content effortlessly?
How might we integrate vernacular voice search deeply?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick info for my business.
personas.bio: Rohan uses internet for business growth, seeking market prices and supplier details.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I want fast, accurate answers for my studies.
personas.bio: Priya is tech-savvy, uses search for academic research and general knowledge.

insights: "Where can I find local train schedules?"
"This looks simple, but can it understand me?"
"I hope it shows results in my language."

points.action: Replace text input with dominant voice search.
Integrate visual search with local language recognition.
Tailor search results based on user's inferred location.
Simplify search interface for first-time internet users.

pivot.before: Generic global search interface, potentially overwhelming for new Indian users.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from universal minimalism to context-aware, culturally resonant, and accessible search.
pivot.after: Personalized, vernacular-first search experience, empowering diverse users.

annotations.title: Voice Input
annotations.rationale: Crucial for vernacular search and low literacy users.

annotations.title: Language Toggle
annotations.rationale: Easy switching between primary local languages.

annotations.title: Localized Suggestions
annotations.rationale: Proactively offers relevant local trending topics.

data.finding: Search bar and main actions are clearly visible.
Interface elements are consistent across desktop and mobile.
Minimal input, few error opportunities on homepage.
Offers language options, but limited personalization visible.
